title: alchemilla vulgaris proles subcrenata
intro: Alchemilla vulgaris proles subcrenata, also known as the lady's mantle, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Alchemilla vulgaris proles subcrenata include its ability to soothe menstrual cramps, reduce bleeding, and alleviate symptoms of menopause, as well as its use as a topical treatment for minor wounds and burns. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, or used in herbal creams and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
